justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently and accurately interpreted all of the user's temporal preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering proactive alternatives beyond checking other times on the same day or next week.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation involved multiple avoidable round-trips where the agent simply reported unavailability for each specific time the user suggested.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was frustrating due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest available times, leading to a repetitive and unproductive exchange of unavailable slots.

overall_notes: The agent effectively understood all user requests but failed to proactively assist in finding an available appointment, leading to a lengthy and ultimately unsuccessful interaction.
